title: feat: move all tiers to hourly pollen refills
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A steady drip of pollen
gist.blurb: We've switched all our tiers from daily dumps to a steady hourly drip of Pollen. No more waiting until midnight to get your creative juices flowing again!
gist.summary: All user tiers now receive Pollen credit refills on an hourly basis rather than a single daily drop, streamlining the backend and providing a smoother experience.
gist.impact: Users will now see their Pollen balances top up every hour, meaning you never have to wait a full day to resume generating.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee managing a steady, continuous flow of pollen. An hourglass or a dripping honey dipper represents the hourly aspect. Glowing lime green pollen drops falling into a jar.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wristwatch, happily watching glowing lime green (#ecf874) pollen drops fall from a retro hourglass into a glass jar. Soft lavender and peach pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wristwatch, happily watching glowing lime green (#ecf874) pollen drops fall from a retro hourglass into a glass jar.
